content_fingerprint: fireworks ai launches training platform preview enabling end to end frontier model development fireworks ai has entered the model training space with a new platform preview that lets teams train and deploy frontier scale models on a single unified system fireworks ai announced on april 3 2026 that its new training platform is now available in preview marking a significant expansion of the company s offerings beyond inference the platform is described as an end to end solution for training and deploying frontier models at scale targeting three distinct types of teams with tailored interfaces th
